source_note: Partial Phase 0 run — 4 sub-spikes resolved by user-confirmed facts (2026-04-26), 3 sub-spikes measured below.

auto_termination.behavior: unended trials are NOT auto-terminated by the harness
auto_termination.implication: no stale-trial GC behavior to model

rate_limit.behavior: no throttling observed on StartPlayground burst calls

rotation.behavior: instruction text rotates per StartPlayground call for the same task_id
rotation.implication: local clone must serve N variants per task

url_lifetime.behavior: harness_url stays reachable effectively forever after EndTrial
url_lifetime.implication: no URL-expiration handling needed in clients
